name: Area
description: Surface measurement units used for sheets, covers, and applied materials.

name: Length
description: Linear measurement units used for raw materials and cut lengths.

name: Time
description: Time-based units used for labor, rentals, and service billing.

name: Unit
description: Count-based units used for item quantities and packaged pieces.

name: Volume
description: Liquid and fill-volume units used in purchase and stock movements.

name: Weight
description: Mass-based units used for weighted stock and material costing.
